shortDescription: IDP India · Academic module · 4–6 week intensive · Exam deadline focus

policyAlert.summary: Crash enrollment only when diagnostic gap to target is realistic (typically ≤ 1 band). Book IELTS via ieltsidpindia.com only. Never guarantee a band score.

alert.title: Intensive pace — not for beginners
alert.body: Crash suits retakes, near-target students, or hard deadlines. Diagnostic 5.0 → target 7.0 in 4 weeks is not crash-eligible. Academic module only.

about.label: Description
about.value: Fast-track IELTS Academic preparation for students with an exam deadline or retake window. Daily classes, heavy homework, focused skill drills, and timed mocks.

about.label: Ideal for
about.value: Retake students within ~0.5–1.0 band of target, conditional offer deadlines, or post-Regular booster needs — not first-time learners far below target.

about.label: Delivery
about.value: Intensive classroom or hybrid. Materials per branch policy. Higher attendance expectation than Regular.

about.label: Exam authority (India)
about.value: IDP IELTS India (ieltsidpindia.com) — sole test booking channel since July 2021. FLC prepares; student registers and pays exam fee separately.

about.label: After course
about.value: Exam booking support, TRF tracking, booster or Regular recommendation if crash timeline insufficient.

eligibility.criterion: Diagnostic shows gap ≤ 1.0 band to agreed target (or skill retake)

redFlagsBanner: If mocks stay far below target mid-crash, pause exam booking — offer Regular extension or realistic retake date.

redFlags.title: Not crash-eligible
redFlags.description: Large band gap or weak foundation.

faqs.q: Crash vs Regular — when to choose?
faqs.a: Regular for 1.0+ band improvement over 8–10 weeks. Crash when diagnostic is near target and deadline is tight.
Minimum two full mocks; book exam only when latest mock is within 0.5 of target.
Student pays IDP on ieltsidpindia.com — separate from crash course fee.

faqs.q: Can we guarantee band 7 in crash?
faqs.a: No. Outcomes depend on starting level, attendance, and exam performance.

compliance: Never guarantee an IELTS band score
Document crash eligibility on enrollment form
Separate coaching fee from IDP exam fee
proTips: Use crash only after Regular incomplete or retake with clear skill gap
Book IDP slot only after second mock confirms readiness
Brief on test day checklist in final week
postApproval: Plan retake or OSR if one skill below target

timeline.title: Daily classes, drills, weekly speaking mocks
IDP booking, test day prep, TRF follow-up

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Initial IELTS Academic Crash coaching specimen.

staffNotes.author: Coaching team
staffNotes.text: Decline crash if gap > 1 band unless skill-specific retake with manager approval.

donts: Enroll large band-gap students in crash
Mix GT leads into Academic crash

quiz.question: IELTS Academic Crash is best suited when:
options: Diagnostic gap to target is typically ≤ 1 band
Student needs GT for Canada PR
quiz.explanation: Crash is for near-target or retake students with a deadline.

quiz.question: Minimum attendance standard for crash is approximately:
quiz.explanation: Intensive pace requires higher attendance than Regular.

quiz.question: IELTS exam fee in India is paid to:
Before booking the exam, crash policy recommends:
A GT student should be enrolled in:
quiz.explanation: Module must match migration or study pathway.

quiz.question: If student misses multiple classes in week 1:
quiz.explanation: Crash pace cannot be recovered after early absenteeism.

quiz.question: Minimum full mocks in crash course:
quiz.explanation: At least two full timed mocks.

quiz.question: IDP India became sole IELTS distributor in India in:
quiz.explanation: Book only on ieltsidpindia.com since July 2021.
